title: Smoker Watches the Pirate Era
description: On pages 17–18, smoker watches the pirate era focuses on Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp as news of Luffy’s bounty spreads across the East Blue as the crew sails toward their next destination.
scene: On pages 17–18, smoker watches the pirate era focuses on Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp as news of Luffy’s bounty spreads across the East Blue as the crew sails toward their next destination.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Look. Luffy's become a wanted man.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Maybe our village will become known for being the home of a famous pirate!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Stop celebrating, you fools! Just what's there to be happy about having a criminal come from our village!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Haha, but look, chief. Look how happy Luffy seems.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: This room is often called "Military Storage."

dialogue.speaker: Dragon
dialogue.text: This is how you wind the rope.

summary: This part shifts the story from local East Blue battles to the wider pirate world reacting to Luffy’s new bounty.
